description: Hard short-answer questions: multi-hop, common misconceptions, indirect phrasings. Designed so a generic single-search baseline scores well below 100% and the stem has headroom to specialize. Used during stem evolution; never appears in eval_set.json.

tasks.question: Who succeeded Winston Churchill as British Prime Minister in 1955?
tasks.notes: Churchill resigned April 1955; Eden took office the same month.

tasks.question: What is the capital city of the country whose largest river is the Murray?
tasks.notes: Multi-hop: Murray River -> Australia -> Canberra. A snippet-skim agent often returns Sydney.

tasks.question: What is the second-largest moon in our solar system, by diameter?
tasks.notes: Ganymede is #1 (5,268 km); Titan #2 (5,149 km). Snippet-skim often returns Ganymede or Europa.

tasks.question: What was the first artificial object to enter orbit around a planet other than Earth?
tasks.notes: Entered Mars orbit November 14, 1971, just days before the Soviet Mars 2.

tasks.question: Which U.S. president served more than two terms in office?
tasks.notes: Four terms (1933-1945). Twenty-second Amendment (1951) later capped presidents at two.
